## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or it's justified above)
- [ ] If a release: version bumped in `pyproject.toml`  plus a `CHANGELOG.md` entry
